title: Understand: chromosomes
description: Check your understanding of chromosomes in this set of free practice questions aligned to NGSS standards.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How many molecules of DNA make up each chromosome?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>Each chromosome in a cell contains \_\_\_\_\_\_.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>In a cell, each chromosome contains \_\_\_\_\_\_ of DNA.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Where are chromosomes found in multicellular organisms?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which of these statements about chromosomes in multicellular organisms is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Chromosomes are found inside a cell’s nucleus.
Chromosomes are found floating in a cell’s cytosol.
Chromosomes are found outside a cell’s plasma membrane.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>In multicellular organisms, chromosomes are found \_\_\_\_\_\_ of the cell.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which of these best defines a gene?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: a piece of hereditary material that is passed from parents to offspring
a trait that helps determine the way an organism looks
a DNA molecule that makes up a chromosome

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>A gene can be defined as a \_\_\_\_\_\_.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: piece of hereditary material that is passed from parents to offspring
trait that helps determine the way an organism looks
DNA molecule that makes up a chromosome

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these best describes a gene?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: a piece of hereditary material that is passed from parents to offspring
a trait that helps determine the way an organism behaves
a DNA molecule that makes up a chromosome

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which two statements about homologous chromosomes are true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: They have all the same alleles.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which two statements about homologous chromosomes are true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: They have different sets of genes.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which two statements about homologous chromosomes are true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: They have the same size and shape.
They have the same set of genes.
They have matching alleles for each gene.
